title: Bombay High Court closes case against four accused in 2006 Malegaon blast
description: The Bombay High Court on Wednesday quashed the order framing charges against four accused in the 2006 Malegaon blast case [Rajendra Chaudhary & Ors. v. Union of India & Ors.]A division bench of Chief Justice Shree Chandrashekhar and Justice Shyam Chandak pronounced the order on appeals filed by the accused against a September 2025 order of a special court framing charges against them.Chief Justice Shree Chandrashekhar and Justice Shyam Chandak The appeal also questioned the manner in whi
